title: Tombi
description:
**Tombi** (鳶 `/toɴbi/`) is a toolkit for TOML; providing a formatter/linter and language server.
See the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/tombi-toml/tombi) for more information.

toml-version.title: TOML version
toml-version.description: TOML version to use if not specified in the schema and comment directive.

include.title: File patterns to include
include.description:
The file match pattern to include in formatting and linting.
Supports glob pattern.

exclude.title: File patterns to exclude
exclude.description:
The file match pattern to exclude from formatting and linting.
Supports glob pattern.

array-bracket-space-width.title: The number of spaces inside the brackets of a single line array.

array-comma-space-width.title: The number of spaces after the comma in a single line array.

date-time-delimiter.title: The delimiter between date and time
date-time-delimiter.description:
In accordance with [RFC 3339](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc3339), you can use `T` or space character between date and time.

- `T`: Use `T` between date and time like `2001-01-01T00:00:00`
- `space`: Use space between date and time like `2001-01-01 00:00:00`
- `preserve`: Preserve the original delimiter.

indent-style.title: The style of indentation
indent-style.description:
Whether to use spaces or tabs for indentation.

- `space`: Use spaces for indentation.
- `tab`: Use tabs for indentation.

indent-sub-tables.title: Whether to indent the sub-tables
indent-sub-tables.description:
If `true`, the sub-table will be indented.

```toml
[table]
    [table.sub-table]
    key = "value"
# ^^  <- this
```

indent-table-key-value-pairs.title: Whether to indent the table key-value pairs
indent-table-key-value-pairs.description:
If `true`, the table key-value pairs will be indented.

```toml
[table]
    key = "value"
# ^^  <- this
```

indent-width.title: The number of spaces per indentation level
indent-width.description:
⚠️ **WARNING** ⚠️\
This option is only used when the indentation style is `space`.

inline-table-brace-space-width.title: The number of spaces inside the brackets of a single line inline table.

inline-table-comma-space-width.title: The number of spaces after the comma in a single line inline table.

key-value-equals-sign-alignment.title: Whether to align the equals sign in the key-value pairs.
key-value-equals-sign-alignment.description:
If `true`, the equals sign in the key-value pairs will be aligned.

⚠️ **WARNING** ⚠️\
This feature does **not** apply to key-value pairs inside single line inline tables.

```toml
# BEFORE
key = "value1"
key2 = "value2"
key3.key4 = "value3"

# AFTER
key       = "value1"
key2      = "value2"
key3.key4 = "value3"
```

string-quote-style.title: The preferred quote character for strings
string-quote-style.description: Choose which quote style the formatter prefers for basic strings.

trailing-comment-alignment.title: Whether to align the trailing comments in the key-value pairs.
trailing-comment-alignment.description:
If `true`, the trailing comments in value/key-value pairs will be aligned.

**📝 NOTE 📝**\
The trailing comments of table header are not targeted by alignment.

```toml
# BEFORE
key = "value1"  # comment 1
key2 = "value2"  # comment 2
key3.key4 = "value3"  # comment 3

# AFTER
key = "value1"        # comment 1
key2 = "value2"       # comment 2
key3.key4 = "value3"  # comment 3
```

key-value-equals-sign-space-width.title: The number of spaces around the equals sign in a key-value pair.

line-ending.title: The type of line ending
line-ending.description:
In TOML, the line ending must be either `LF` or `CRLF`.

- `lf`: Line Feed only (`\n`), common on Linux and macOS as well as inside git repos.
- `crlf`: Carriage Return Line Feed (`\r\n`), common on Windows.

line-width.title: The maximum line width
line-width.description: The formatter will try to keep lines within this width.

trailing-comment-space-width.title: The number of spaces before the trailing comment.

StringQuoteStyle.description: The preferred quote character for strings.

oneOf.description: Automatically detects the line ending style from the source file.

key-empty.title: Key empty
key-empty.description:
Check if the key is empty.

```toml
# VALID BUT DISCOURAGED
"" = true
```

dotted-keys-out-of-order.title: Dotted keys out of order
dotted-keys-out-of-order.description:
Check if dotted keys are defined out of order.

```toml
# VALID BUT DISCOURAGED
apple.type = "fruit"
orange.type = "fruit"
apple.skin = "thin"
orange.skin = "thick"

# RECOMMENDED
apple.type = "fruit"
apple.skin = "thin"
orange.type = "fruit"
orange.skin = "thick"
```

tables-out-of-order.title: Tables out of order
tables-out-of-order.description:
Check if tables are defined out of order.

```toml
# VALID BUT DISCOURAGED
[fruit.apple]
[animal]
[fruit.orange]

# RECOMMENDED
[fruit.apple]
[fruit.orange]
[animal]
```

strict.title: Enable strict schema validation
strict.description:
If `additionalProperties` is not specified in the JSON Schema,
the strict mode treats it as `additionalProperties: false`,
which is different from the JSON Schema specification.

paths.title: The schema catalog path/url array
paths.description:
The catalog is evaluated after the schemas specified by [[schemas]].\
Schemas are loaded in order from the beginning of the catalog list.

SchemaCatalogPath.description: Generic value that can be either single or multiple

RootSchema.title: The schema for the root table

toml-version.title: The TOML version that the schema is available

include.title: The file match pattern of the schema
include.description:
The file match pattern to include the target to apply the schema.
Supports glob pattern.

array-values-order.title: Whether schema-defined array values ordering is enabled

table-keys-order.title: Whether schema-defined table key ordering is enabled

enabled.title: Whether schema-defined array values ordering is enabled
Whether schema-defined table key ordering is enabled

deprecated.title: Deprecated
deprecated.description: Override the deprecated diagnostic level for this schema.

PatternAccessor.title: Accessor pattern
PatternAccessor.description:
To apply it to the Root Table, use `""`.

Array indices are matched as wildcards. That means `[*]` and numeric
indices such as `[0]` are treated the same and will match any array
element, so `items[0].name` behaves like `items[*].name`.

**Example**:
  - `""`
  - `"tool.*"`
  - `"items[*].name"`

array-values-order.title: Override array values ordering for matched roots

table-keys-order.title: Override table key ordering for matched roots

SchemaOverrideArrayValuesOrderRule.title: Override array values ordering for matched roots

SchemaOverrideTableKeysOrderRule.title: Override table key ordering for matched roots

deprecated.title: Override deprecated diagnostics for matched roots

SubSchema.title: The schema for the sub value

root.title: The accessors to apply the sub schema

include.title: The file match pattern of the sub schema
include.description:
The file match pattern to include the target to apply the sub schema.
Supports glob pattern.

include.title: File patterns to include
include.description:
The file match pattern to include in formatting and linting.
Supports glob pattern.

exclude.title: File patterns to exclude
exclude.description:
The file match pattern to exclude from formatting and linting.
Supports glob pattern.

Extensions.title: Extension options
Extensions.description:
🚧 Currently, third-party extensions are not supported,
and only built-in extensions are provided. 🚧

enabled.title: Enable feature
enabled.description: Whether this nested feature is enabled.

dependency-version.title: Dependency version inlay hint feature
dependency-version.description: Whether inlay hints show dependency versions.

workspace-value.title: Workspace value inlay hint feature
workspace-value.description: Whether inlay hints show values inherited from the Cargo workspace.

dependency.title: Dependency navigation feature
dependency.description: Whether navigation resolves dependency definitions and declarations.

member.title: Member navigation feature
member.description: Whether navigation resolves workspace member targets.

cargo-toml.title: Cargo.toml document link feature
cargo-toml.description: Whether document links are created for `Cargo.toml` references.

crates-io.title: crates.io document link feature
crates-io.description: Whether document links are created for crates.io package references.

git.title: Git document link feature
git.description: Whether document links are created for Git references.

path.title: Path document link feature
path.description: Whether document links are created for filesystem paths.

workspace.title: Workspace document link feature
workspace.description: Whether document links are created for `workspace = true` references.

enabled.title: Enable feature
enabled.description: Whether this nested feature is enabled.

dependency-detail.title: Dependency detail hover feature
dependency-detail.description: Whether hover shows detailed dependency metadata.

inherit-from-workspace.title: Inherit-from-workspace code action feature
inherit-from-workspace.description: Whether code actions can replace a value with `workspace = true`.

inherit-dependency-from-workspace.title: Inherit-dependency-from-workspace code action feature
inherit-dependency-from-workspace.description: Whether code actions can inherit dependency settings from the workspace.

convert-dependency-to-table-format.title: Convert-dependency-to-table-format code action feature
convert-dependency-to-table-format.description: Whether code actions can rewrite inline dependencies to table format.

add-to-workspace-and-inherit-dependency.title: Add-to-workspace-and-inherit-dependency code action feature
add-to-workspace-and-inherit-dependency.description: Whether code actions can add a dependency to the workspace and inherit it.

dependency-version.title: Dependency version inlay hint feature
dependency-version.description: Whether inlay hints show resolved dependency versions.

dependency.title: Dependency navigation feature
dependency.description: Whether navigation resolves dependency definitions and declarations.

member.title: Member navigation feature
member.description: Whether navigation resolves workspace member targets.

pyproject-toml.title: pyproject.toml document link feature
pyproject-toml.description: Whether document links are created for `pyproject.toml` references.

pypi-org.title: PyPI document link feature
pypi-org.description: Whether document links are created for `pypi.org` package references.

dependency-detail.title: Dependency detail hover feature
dependency-detail.description: Whether hover shows detailed dependency metadata.

use-workspace-dependency.title: Use-workspace-dependency code action feature
use-workspace-dependency.description: Whether code actions can reuse a dependency declared in the workspace.

add-to-workspace-and-use-workspace-depen.title: Add-to-workspace-and-use-workspace-dependency code action feature
add-to-workspace-and-use-workspace-depen.description: Whether code actions can add a dependency to the workspace and reuse it.

path.title: Path document link feature
path.description: Whether document links are created for filesystem paths.
